zone_name: Royal Palace of Mareldja - City of Mareldja

1571.name: Palace Entrance
1571.description: The palace entrance is filled with polished blocks of white and grey marble and illuminated by several small globes on top of silver rods. An archway sits to the south, supported by fluted columns of the same grey stone. The effect is one of airy immensity and tasteful reserve. A small door rests open to the east, and another to the north leads outside.

e.to_zone: Royal Palace of Mareldja - City of Mareldja

s.to_zone: Royal Palace of Mareldja - City of Mareldja

w.to_zone: Royal Palace of Mareldja - City of Mareldja

npcs.name: Servant
npcs.description: beaten a few too many times; who has been broken by the lash.

1572.name: Hall of Frescoes
1572.description: Two frescoes follow you as you wander down the hall, both by the famous artist Vardil. To the south is a set of doors, carved with elaborate floral patterns framing the symbol of a sword through a crown, the blade pointing downward. To the north you can see the palace entrance. Remembrance of the Zephyr is no longer on cooldown!

n.to_zone: Royal Palace of Mareldja - City of Mareldja

s.to_zone: Royal Palace of Mareldja - City of Mareldja

w.to_zone: Royal Palace of Mareldja - City of Mareldja

npcs.name: Emissary Elondir
npcs.description: braid. His eyes, a shade of piercing green, survey the room with an air of

npcs.name: Palace guard
npcs.description: A guard of the palace stands here guarding the entrance to the council chambers. You might want to think of a good reason for being here if you intend

1573.name: Audience Hall
1573.description: The audience hall is a vast and airy place. A map of the world is inlaid upon the the floor in malachite, jasper, lapis, and other semi-precious stones representing forests, fields, water, and mountains. A huge set of doors sits to the north, carved with floral patterns and gleaming with jewels. A wooden throne rests atop a dias beneath a banner depicting a sword within a crown, its blade pointing downward.

n.to_zone: Royal Palace of Mareldja - City of Mareldja

npcs.name: Avartis Festa
npcs.description: His clothes are obviously expensive, but not as flamboyant as those of others. He inspects you with a detached, aristocratic air and nods distantly.

npcs.name: Kyrac Calaista
npcs.description: He is a tall man with dark hair and a dark complexion.  An aura of power surrounds him.  He is clad in black, and a glowing ring encircles his finger.

npcs.name: Teltheilar
npcs.description: crown of strangely opalescent metal.  Her countenance is both imperial and kind, and she sits upon the throne with the surety of one born to rule.

1670.name: Ballroom
1670.description: Alternating tiles of white and reddish marble spread out before you, while the tiles around the perimeter are inlaid with onyx and mother of pearl. A marvelous tapestry depicting the founding of the city covers the entire western wall. Your footsteps echo loudly across the open chamber.

e.to_zone: Royal Palace of Mareldja - City of Mareldja

n.to_zone: Royal Palace of Mareldja - City of Mareldja

d.to_zone: Royal Palace of Mareldja - City of Mareldja

npcs.name: Herveg Carlaaki
npcs.description: with Ilanya.  You feel sorry for him.

npcs.name: Ilanya Festa
npcs.description: lady of the court.  She smiles coquettishly at Herveg and tries to ignore

npcs.name: Nederic Nedaris
npcs.description: favor.  He looks around huffily for someone with whom to share his

npcs.name: Poodle
npcs.description: hair, but it has been knocked askew from its owner's constant fussing. The poodle has a high-pitched yip which is rather annoying.

1671.name: Large Chamber
1671.description: A great Rildanian carpet sprawls across the floor, scarlets, blues, and browns woven in a complex geometric pattern. A faceted mirror on the eastern wall shoots off prisms and gives the room the illusion of vastness. Wide marble stairs sweep gracefully upward beside a door leading east to the entrance hall. To the south you can see the ballroom, tiles arranged in a chessboard pattern.

e.to_zone: Royal Palace of Mareldja - City of Mareldja

u.to_zone: Royal Palace of Mareldja - City of Mareldja

2000.name: Hall of Frescoes
2000.description: Two frescoes follow you as you wander down the hall, both by the famous patterns framing the symbol of a sword through a crown, the blade pointing downward. To the north you can see the palace entrance.

s.to_zone: Royal Palace of Mareldja - City of Mareldja

2001.name: Guard Office
2001.description: Shields and banners hang upon the walls of this spacious room. Off to the corner sits a desk and chair, and beside it a small bookcase. A lamp blown from green glass sits atop a table, giving off an emerald circle on the wood. A doorway in the western wall leads out to the entrance, and a staircase leads down.

npcs.name: Palace guard
npcs.description: A guard of the palace stands here guarding the entrance to the council chambers. You might want to think of a good reason for being here if you intend

2005.name: Guard Room
2005.description: A small room at the foot of a flight of stone stairs holds a table, a few chairs, and a weapons rack. Scentless and smokeless oil lamps burn upon the wall, and a wooden sign bears the motto, "Vigilance in duty, vigilance in honor. " Cells lie to the north and east.

e.to_zone: Royal Palace of Mareldja - City of Mareldja

w.to_zone: Royal Palace of Mareldja - City of Mareldja

2006.name: Cell
2006.description: The cell is about 8x10, quite decent as far as dungeon cells go. A small cot sits by the wall next to a ceramic chamber pot. The air in here smells of vomit and alcohol.

w.to_zone: Royal Palace of Mareldja - City of Mareldja

npcs.name: Servant
npcs.description: beaten a few too many times; who has been broken by the lash.

3045.name: Spiral Staircase
3045.description: The staircase winds grandly along the inside of a tower. A wall on either side prevents vertigo, and the only indication of height that you have is the occasional window where you can gaze out at the city or the sea.

d.to_zone: Royal Palace of Mareldja - City of Mareldja

u.to_zone: Royal Palace of Mareldja - City of Mareldja

2717.name: Hidden Passageway
2717.description: The passageway widens at some places and narrows in others. You surmise that you are passing between the rooms of the palace, and that it varies in size according to their layouts. To the south you see a narrow staircase leading up.

n.to_zone: Royal Palace of Mareldja - City of Mareldja

u.to_zone: Royal Palace of Mareldja - City of Mareldja

2718.name: Hidden Passageway
2718.description: You wander between the palace walls in a place that does not theoretically exist. Sometimes you can hear faint voices from the other side of the wall, but there are no peepholes for you to spy. To the north, the passageway ends at a tightly spiraling staircase leading up. The power of the ocean gradually subsides.

s.to_zone: Royal Palace of Mareldja - City of Mareldja

u.to_zone: Royal Palace of Mareldja - City of Mareldja

3046.name: The Tower of Rascilivir
3046.description: The staircase ends at the top of the tower, presenting a dazzling view of the city below. You see little patches of color amidst an orderly pattern of dusty beige. Light, fleecy clouds float across the horizon, and you can faintly hear the crashing of the sea.

d.to_zone: Royal Palace of Mareldja - City of Mareldja

npcs.name: Vardil
npcs.description: intensity.  He has devoted his entire life to capturing and retaining beauty, yet at times he wonders whether his vision is false and his attempts futile.

1775.name: Treasure Chamber
1775.description: Chests piled high with gold coins and gleaming jewels fill the room. Beautifully wrought necklaces and bracelets shimmer in the light. Bars of bullion lie stacked against the wall. The idea of such immense wealth gathered in such a small place dazzles you.

s.to_zone: Royal Palace of Mareldja - City of Mareldja

2716.name: Narrow Stairway
2716.description: A narrow stairway leads down into the gloom. Shining from the top, you can see a square of light leading to the ballroom, but it does not penetrate very far.

d.to_zone: Royal Palace of Mareldja - City of Mareldja

u.to_zone: Royal Palace of Mareldja - City of Mareldja

2719.name: Spiral Staircase
2719.description: The staircase climbs an iron pole, around and around. There is not much room for maneuvering. It is your guess that outside the walls is a public staircase, and that the people using it have no idea that a secondary staircase is a mere wall's-breadth away. At the staircase top to the north is a door.
